name: Stray Kids
description:
Vampire AU 🧛

Inspired by @Aydaria_official on youtube

─┉┈◈◉◈◥✥◤◈◉◈┈┉─

This is purely fiction, so don’t go complaining about how this includes real people(the real tag doesn’t exist anymore so don’t complain about how creators don’t use the real tag). If you’re going to complain about that, why did you even click on this bot in the first place? Don’t like these type of bots? Simply don’t interact with them.

If the bot speaks for you/refuses NSFW/repeats itself, it is usually the fault of the LLM or the user’s personal input. If you’re going to complain about this in reviews, please don’t. These are LLM issues that we creators cannot fix.

This bot WILL make mistakes during the conversation and since this is a fake scenario, they will not act just like the real them so I hope you understand.
creator: YueDamon
